requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3及危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3及危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to South Korea must have UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 test evidence where transport rules require it. Exporters should prepare a UN 38.3 test summary, SDS, dangerous-goods classification, packaging evidence, and air or sea transport documentation before shipment.
summary.zh: 运往韩国的锂电芯和电池在运输规则要求时须具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分38.3小节测试证据。出口商应在出货前准备UN 38.3测试概要、SDS、危险货物分类、包装证据以及空运或海运运输文件。
summary.zht: 運往韓國的鋰電芯和電池在運輸規則要求時須具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分38.3小節測試證據。出口商應在出貨前準備UN 38.3測試概要、SDS、危險貨物分類、包裝證據以及空運或海運運輸文件。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
ICAO Technical Instructions / IATA DGR for air transport

summary.en: China exporters commonly prepare UN 38.3 reports, MSDS/SDS, transport conditions appraisal reports, and dangerous-goods packaging documents for lithium battery shipments. These documents remain necessary but must match the exact cell or battery configuration shipped to Korea.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常为锂电池货运准备UN 38.3报告、MSDS/SDS、运输条件鉴定书和危险货物包装文件。这些文件仍然必要，但必须与实际运往韩国的电芯或电池配置一致。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常為鋰電池貨運準備UN 38.3報告、MSDS/SDS、運輸條件鑑定書和危險貨物包裝文件。這些文件仍然必要，但必須與實際運往韓國的電芯或電池配置一致。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and test summary

gap.en: Transport evidence is configuration-specific. A UN 38.3 report for a cell may not cover a module, rack, container, replacement battery pack, or altered state of charge. Korean importers, carriers, ports, and airlines may reject inconsistent test summaries, SDS classifications, package marks, or shipping names.
gap.zh: 运输证据与配置强相关。电芯UN 38.3报告未必覆盖模组、电池架、集装箱、替换电池包或改变荷电状态后的产品。韩国进口商、承运人、港口和航空公司可能拒收测试概要、SDS分类、包装标识或运输品名不一致的货物。
gap.zht: 運輸證據與配置強相關。電芯UN 38.3報告未必覆蓋模組、電池架、集裝箱、替換電池包或改變荷電狀態後的產品。韓國進口商、承運人、港口和航空公司可能拒收測試概要、SDS分類、包裝標識或運輸品名不一致的貨物。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KC or Chinese GB battery safety evidence does not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence. The shipped configuration must be covered by the UN 38.3 test summary and dangerous-goods documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] KC或中国GB电池安全证据不能替代UN 38.3运输证据。实际出货配置必须被UN 38.3测试概要和危险货物文件覆盖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] KC或中國GB電池安全證據不能替代UN 38.3運輸證據。實際出貨配置必須被UN 38.3測試概要和危險貨物文件覆蓋。
